description_long: This is a large, six-wheeled fire truck with a bright red body and white lower panels, designed for emergency response in urban environments. The vehicle features a robust front grille, side mirrors, and a cab with four doors, providing access for multiple crew members. On the roof, there are two mounted ladders and what appear to be hose storage tubes, as well as blue emergency lights. The sides of the truck are equipped with multiple compartment doors for storing firefighting equipment and tools. The rear of the truck includes a ladder for roof access and additional storage space. The overall construction is heavy-duty, with metal surfaces and reinforced components for durability and safety.
description: A large red and white fire truck with six wheels, roof ladders, emergency lights, and multiple side compartments for firefighting equipment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille, windshield, side mirrors, and blue emergency lights on the roof.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the cab, three axles, side compartments, and roof ladders.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the roof ladders, rear ladder for access, and the back of the storage compartments.
description_view_3: Right side view with similar features to the left, including the cab, side compartments, and visible wheels.
